channel.title: Pages on Leopold Gregor Goedhart
channel.description: Recent content in Pages on Leopold Gregor Goedhart

item.title: CV
item.description: CV File Have a look @ my current CV! Timeline 2006 - 2010 “Katholische Schule Hochalle” (Elementary school in Hamburg, Germany) 2010 - 2018 “Gymnasium Eppendorf” (High school in Hamburg, Germany) 2019 January - March F&S Solar (Internship in Santo Domingo, Dominican Republic) April - June Racah Institute of Physics (Internship in Jerusalem, Israel) July - September Houlihan Lokey (Internship in Tel Aviv, Israel) 2019 - Today B.Sc. ETH Physics @ ETH in Zürich, Switzerland.

item.title: About
item.description: About Hi! My name is Leopold Goedhart and I am currently a B.Sc. student @ the physics department of ETH in Zürich (Switzerland). I was born and raised in Hamburg (Germany) and visited elementary and high school there. In July 2018 I graduated and started my gap year. From January to March 2019 I was an intern at F&S Solar in Santo Domingo, Dominican Republic. This internship was followed by a stay in Israel from April to June 2019.
